title: Add MCP tool server for cross-agent shared workspace
source: MCP Specification 2025-11-25 — shared workspace protocol for multi-agent orchestration
description: Expose CTO Orchestrator internal state (tickets, team context, decisions) as MCP tool server. Agents pull context they need via MCP calls instead of bloated prompt injection.
proposed_changes: Create cto_mcp_server.py exposing tools: get_ticket, get_team_context, send_team_message, reserve_files, get_adrs. Pass --mcp-config to claude -p. Reduce prompt size dramatically.
